brief_summary: Horizontal time axis with four buy-shape markers — flash drop (~11 min, left), Sweet Nightmare four-day window (fuchsia-emphasized, center-left), open-ended pre-order, and formal GMK CYL group buy (4-5 weeks, right). Each marker has a label above and a one-line description below. Caption: 'window sized to the cohort, not the cohort sized to the window'.
data_sources: gsk-sweet-nightmare-group-buy.mdx § 'A four-day window on a formal group buy' — 'Either they are flash drops — a maker posts on a Sunday, sells out in eleven minutes ... or they are open-ended pre-orders ... Sweet Nightmare sits in that middle, but at the tightest end of it. Four days is long enough to be a window rather than a drop ... A flash-drop genre is borrowing formal-group-buy chrome'
